task_completion.description: Configure the WorldInfo node with the correct GPS coordinate system and reference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or text editor, the WorldInfo node should have 'gpsCoordinateSystem' set to "WGS84" and 'gpsReference' set to 37.7749 -122.4194 15.0.

task_completion.description: Configure the pano_camera projection and field of view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or text editor, the 'pano_camera' node should have its 'projection' field set to "spherical" and 'fieldOfView' set to exactly 6.28318.

task_completion.description: Configure the pano_camera width and height for 360 capture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or text editor, the 'pano_camera' node should have 'width' set to 4096 and 'height' set to 2048.

task_completion.description: Upgrade the roof_lidar layers and field of view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or text editor, the 'roof_lidar' node should have 'numberOfLayers' (or layers) set to 64 and 'fieldOfView' set to exactly 6.28318.
In the Webots scene tree or text editor, the 'roof_lidar' node should have 'horizontalResolution' set to 2048.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As' dialog, terminal command, file manager, or Webots window title showing the file saved exactly as 'spherical_mapping.wbt' in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the Webots GUI or a legitimate text editor to modify the .wbt file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots application interface with the scene tree expanded, or a text editor (like VS Code, nano, vim) open with the .wbt file contents, rather than just echoing text into a file blindly.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing world rather than creating a blank file with only the requested parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The edited file or Webots scene tree should contain the full simulation environment (other nodes, vehicle, etc.), not just the isolated WorldInfo, camera, and lidar nodes.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved the file to the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of the save action being completed (e.g., clicking 'Save' in the GUI, or a successful write message in a text editor/terminal) rather than just typing the path without executing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: '/home/ga/Desktop/spherical_mapping.wbt'. Required configurations: WorldInfo 'gpsCoordinateSystem' = "WGS84", 'gpsReference' = [37.7749, -122.4194, 15.0]. pano_camera 'projection' = "spherical", 'width' = 4096, 'height' = 2048, 'fieldOfView' = 6.28318. roof_lidar 'numberOfLayers' = 64, 'horizontalResolution' = 2048, 'fieldOfView' = 6.28318. Note: The FOV for both camera and LiDAR must be exactly 6.28318.
